description: CloudDlpInspectAssetComponent — scan DataFrame text columns for PII via Cloud DLP.

text_columns.label: Text Columns
text_columns.description: Columns whose string values should be inspected. Each row's columns are joined with newlines before inspection.

info_types.label: Info Types
info_types.description: List of Cloud DLP infoType names to detect. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/infotypes-reference

min_likelihood.label: Min Likelihood
min_likelihood.description: Minimum likelihood to surface as a finding.

max_findings_per_row.label: Max Findings Per Row
max_findings_per_row.description: Cap on how many individual findings are recorded per row.

include_quote.label: Include Quote
include_quote.description: If True, include the matching substring in `dlp_findings`. Disabled by default — quotes can themselves be PII.

output_prefix.label: Output Prefix
output_prefix.description: Column-name prefix for added analysis columns.

name: Cloud Dlp Inspect Asset
